ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific sensor that collected the data */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection interval */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parameter type */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the meteorological parameter */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data (e.g., good, suspect, missing) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_interval_id FOREIGN KEY ("interval_id") REFERENCES data_intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameter_types ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., rain_sfc, wspd_10) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum possible value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum possible value for the parameter */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Precision of the measurement (number of decimal places) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the interval (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interval */,
  "interval_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interval in minutes */,
  "interval_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the interval (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format (e.g., csv, json) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the validation process */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation */,
  "validation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the validation process in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
